title: restio distylis
intro: Restio distylis, also known as the "Two-Style Restio", is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the Restionaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Restio distylis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
